title: Denmark rail accident: Two trains collide head-on near Copenhagen, several injured
summary_full: A severe head-on collision between two local trains in Denmark on Thursday has left several passengers injured. The incident, occurring near Copenhagen, prompted a large-scale emergency response. Authorities confirmed all passengers were safely evacuated, with no one trapped. Investigations into the cause of the major accident are underway.
